title: Invisible XP Orbs
description: A texture pack that hides XP orbes from the player.
body:
This texture pack is specifically designed for situations where you don't need/want to see XP orbs in game. Normally this is due to a mob grinder or other contraption that generates a lot of XP orbs that can hinder your view.

This texture pack should work on some versions before/after 1.7.10 up until they made some folder name changes. . . 

How do I install it?

Basic steps:
1. Download the resource pack.
2. Unzip ( de-compress ) the zipped folder.
3. From the home screen, selection options, and then select 'resource packs'.
4. Drag and drop the un-zipped folder onto this screen, and double click on it to move it from the left side (library) to the right side (active).  

More details:
[Installation Instructions](https://vanillatweaks.net/installation/#resourcepacks)
